description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of dark gray and white exterior walls. The facade is adorned with vertical gardens and large windows, providing both greenery and ample natural light. The structure includes a small front yard with landscaping, a driveway, and a sidewalk with decorative elements. The rear of the house has a spacious balcony or terrace with outdoor seating and potted plants, while the side elevation reveals additional windows and a secondary green wall. The upper floor appears partially open, with visible interior furnishings and a rooftop patio. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with dark gray walls, large windows, vertical gardens, and spacious terraces. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, vertical gardens, large windows, and a landscaped sidewalk with a driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the secondary green wall, additional windows, and the driveway extending to the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a large terrace or balcony, more windows, and a partially open upper floor with visible interior spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the rooftop patio, flat roof, and the continuation of the driveway and sidewalk.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, small porch, steps, and vertical garden accents
